name: mindlog-todo
description: Task management micro-service with an MCP server, REST API and web UI, with integrated RAG.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mindlog/core && npm run build -w @mindlog/server && npm run build -w @mindlog/web
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w @mindlog/core && npm run build -w @mindlog/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mindlog/core && npm run typecheck -w @mindlog/server
